queries.question: Show all English speaking airline employees who work as either gate agents or pilots.
queries.sql:
SELECT Staff.FullName
FROM Staff JOIN Languages ON Staff.LanguageID = Languages.LanguageID
WHERE (Staff.Position = 'Gate Agent' OR Staff.Position = 'Pilot') AND Languages.name = "English"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname WHERE {
  ?staff a :Staff .
  ?languages a :Languages .
  ?staff p:hasLanguages ?languages .
  ?staff p:name ?fullname .
  ?staff p:Position ?position_w .
  ?staff p:Position ?position_w2 .
  ?languages p:name ?name_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?position_w) = "Gate Agent" || STR(?position_w2) = "Pilot")) && STR(?name_w) = "English"))
}

queries.question: Show all gate agents and pilots that speak English.
queries.sql:
SELECT Staff.FullName
FROM Staff JOIN Languages ON Staff.LanguageID = Languages.LanguageID
WHERE Staff.Position = 'Gate Agent' OR Staff.Position = 'Pilot' AND Languages.name = "English"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname WHERE {
  ?staff a :Staff .
  ?languages a :Languages .
  ?staff p:hasLanguages ?languages .
  ?staff p:name ?fullname .
  ?staff p:Position ?position_w .
  ?staff p:Position ?position_w2 .
  ?languages p:name ?name_w .
  FILTER((STR(?position_w) = "Gate Agent" || (STR(?position_w2) = "Pilot" && STR(?name_w) = "English")))
}
